_comment: Drop this into your jcode MCP config to wrap kbot's specialty surface. After saving, jcode will see all kbot tools as `mcp__kbot__*`.

kbot-local._note: Optional. Local-Ollama subset only ($0 cost). Replace <path-to-kernel-repo> with your clone of github.com/isaacsight/kernel, or omit this entry to skip the local-MCP.
